{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_5","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/intake.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"Requirement intake and default stage planning.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport re\n\nfrom harness.models import ClarificationQuestion, IntakeResult, PlannedStage\n\n\nclass IntakeAgent:\n    \"\"\"Heuristic intake agent used before LLM-backed clarification exists.\"\"\"\n\n    COMPLEXITY_RULES = {\n        \"trivial\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 0,\n            \"stages\": [(\"code\", \"coder\"), (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\")],\n        },\n        \"simple\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 1,\n            \"stages\": [(\"code\", \"coder\"), (\"review\", \"reviewer\"), (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\")],\n        },\n        \"medium\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 2,\n            \"stages\": [\n                (\"plan\", \"planner\"),\n                (\"code\", \"coder\"),\n                (\"review\", \"reviewer\"),\n                (\"test\", \"tester\"),\n                (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\"),\n            ],\n        },\n        \"complex\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 3,\n            \"stages\": [\n                (\"plan\", \"planner\"),\n                (\"code\", \"coder\"),\n                (\"review\", \"reviewer\"),\n                (\"test\", \"tester\"),\n                (\"e2e_test\", \"e2e_tester\"),\n                (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\"),\n            ],\n        },\n        \"epic\": {\n            \"max_questions\": 4,\n            \"stages\": [\n                (\"plan\", \"planner\"),\n                (\"code\", \"coder\"),\n                (\"review\", \"reviewer\"),\n                (\"test\", \"tester\"),\n                (\"e2e_test\", \"e2e_tester\"),\n                (\"github_ops\", \"github_ops\"),\n                (\"summary\", \"summarizer\"),\n            ],\n        },\n    }\n\n    COMPLEXITY_KEYWORDS = {\n        \"complex\": {\"architecture\", \"migrate\", \"quota\", \"checkpoint\", \"permission\", \"workflow\"},\n        \"epic\": {\"rewrite\", \"distributed\", \"multi-repo\", \"end-to-end platform\"},\n    }\n\n    def assess_complexity(self, description: str) -> str:\n        normalized = \" \".join(description.lower().split())\n        word_count = len(normalized.split())\n        line_count = len([line for line in description.splitlines() if line.strip()])\n\n        if any(keyword in normalized for keyword in self.COMPLEXITY_KEYWORDS[\"epic\"]) or word_count > 220:\n            return \"epic\"\n        if any(keyword in normalized for keyword in self.COMPLEXITY_KEYWORDS[\"complex\"]) or word_count > 120:\n            return \"complex\"\n        if line_count >= 4 or word_count > 40:\n            return \"medium\"\n        if word_count <= 10:\n            return \"trivial\"\n        return \"simple\"\n\n    def generate_title(self, description: str) -> str:\n        first_line = next((line.strip() for line in description.splitlines() if line.strip()), \"Untitled task\")\n        cleaned = re.sub(r\"\\s+\", \" \", first_line).strip(\" -\")\n        if len(cleaned) <= 80:\n            return cleaned\n        clipped = cleaned[:80].rstrip()\n        last_space = clipped.rfind(\" \")\n        if last_space > 40:\n            clipped = clipped[:last_space]\n        return clipped\n\n    def plan_task(\n        self,\n        description: str,\n        *,\n        goal: str | None = None,\n        verify_cmd: str | None = None,\n    ) -> IntakeResult:\n        complexity = self.assess_complexity(description)\n        stage_defs = self.COMPLEXITY_RULES[complexity][\"stages\"]\n        stages = [\n            PlannedStage(\n                stage_type=stage_type,\n                stage_order=index,\n                model_role=model_role,\n                verify_cmd=verify_cmd if stage_type in {\"test\", \"e2e_test\"} else None,\n                metadata=self._stage_metadata(stage_type),\n            )\n            for index, (stage_type, model_role) in enumerate(stage_defs, start=1)\n        ]\n        return IntakeResult(\n            title=self.generate_title(description),\n            description=description.strip(),\n            complexity=complexity,\n            stages=stages,\n            goal=goal,\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\n            questions=[],\n        )\n\n    GITHUB_OPS_COMMANDS = [\n        'git add -A',\n        'git commit -m \"auto: {summary}\"',\n        'git push',\n    ]\n\n    def _stage_metadata(self, stage_type: str) -> dict:\n        if stage_type == \"github_ops\":\n            return {\n                \"instructions\": \"Commit all changes and push to remote.\",\n                \"commands\": list(self.GITHUB_OPS_COMMANDS),\n            }\n        return {\n            \"instructions\": f\"Execute the `{stage_type}` stage and leave a concise handoff for the next stage.\"\n        }\n\n    def generate_questions(self, description: str, complexity: str | None = None) -> list[ClarificationQuestion]:\n        normalized = description.lower()\n        resolved_complexity = complexity or self.assess_complexity(description)\n        max_questions = self.COMPLEXITY_RULES[resolved_complexity][\"max_questions\"]\n        questions: list[ClarificationQuestion] = []\n\n        if any(keyword in normalized for keyword in {\"blacklist\", \"whitelist\", \"config\", \"setting\"}):\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"storage\",\n                    prompt=\"配置或列表应该存在哪里？\",\n                    default=\"config file\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        if \"test\" not in normalized and \"pytest\" not in normalized:\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"verify_cmd\",\n                    prompt=\"验收命令是什么？没有就留空。\",\n                    default=\"pytest\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        if resolved_complexity in {\"medium\", \"complex\", \"epic\"}:\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"goal\",\n                    prompt=\"你最关心的验收目标是什么？\",\n                    default=\"实现需求并通过相关测试\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        if resolved_complexity in {\"simple\", \"medium\", \"complex\", \"epic\"}:\n            questions.append(\n                ClarificationQuestion(\n                    key=\"needs_cli\",\n                    prompt=\"是否需要额外的 CLI 或管理入口？(y/N)\",\n                    default=\"n\",\n                )\n            )\n\n        return questions[:max_questions]\n\n    def apply_answers(\n        self,\n        description: str,\n        answers: dict[str, str],\n        *,\n        goal: str | None = None,\n        verify_cmd: str | None = None,\n    ) -> IntakeResult:\n        result = self.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\n        questions = self.generate_questions(description, result.complexity)\n\n        enriched_lines = [result.description]\n        effective_goal = goal or result.goal\n        effective_verify = verify_cmd or result.verify_cmd\n\n        storage = answers.get(\"storage\", \"\").strip()\n        if storage:\n            enriched_lines.append(f\"Storage preference: {storage}.\")\n\n        answer_goal = answers.get(\"goal\", \"\").strip()\n        if answer_goal:\n            effective_goal = answer_goal\n\n        answer_verify = answers.get(\"verify_cmd\", \"\").strip()\n        if answer_verify:\n            effective_verify = answer_verify\n\n        needs_cli = answers.get(\"needs_cli\", \"\").strip().lower()\n        if needs_cli in {\"y\", \"yes\", \"true\", \"1\"}:\n            enriched_lines.append(\"User requested a CLI or management entrypoint.\")\n\n        return IntakeResult(\n            title=result.title,\n            description=\"\\n\".join(enriched_lines).strip(),\n            complexity=result.complexity,\n            stages=result.stages,\n            goal=effective_goal,\n            verify_cmd=effective_verify,\n            questions=[question.prompt for question in questions],\n        )\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_6","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' harness/models.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"Core data structures for the autonomous harness.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\nfrom enum import Enum\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\n\n\nclass TaskStatus(str, Enum):\n    PENDING = \"pending\"\n    PLANNING = \"planning\"\n    EXECUTING = \"executing\"\n    PAUSED_QUOTA = \"paused_quota\"\n    PAUSED_PERMISSION = \"paused_permission\"\n    DONE = \"done\"\n    FAILED = \"failed\"\n\n\nclass StageStatus(str, Enum):\n    PENDING = \"pending\"\n    RUNNING = \"running\"\n    DONE = \"done\"\n    FAILED = \"failed\"\n    SKIPPED = \"skipped\"\n\n\nclass RiskLevel(str, Enum):\n    SAFE = \"safe\"\n    MODERATE = \"moderate\"\n    DANGEROUS = \"dangerous\"\n    CRITICAL = \"critical\"\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass PlannedStage:\n    stage_type: str\n    stage_order: int\n    model_role: str\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass TaskRecord:\n    task_id: str\n    title: str\n    description: str\n    goal: Optional[str]\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str]\n    complexity: str\n    priority: int\n    status: TaskStatus\n    working_dir: Optional[str]\n    created_at: str\n    updated_at: str\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass StageRecord:\n    stage_id: str\n    task_id: str\n    stage_type: str\n    stage_order: int\n    model_role: str\n    assigned_model: Optional[str]\n    assigned_provider: Optional[str]\n    status: StageStatus\n    handoff_doc_path: Optional[str]\n    result_summary: Optional[str]\n    token_used: int\n    duration_sec: float\n    started_at: Optional[str]\n    finished_at: Optional[str]\n    retry_count: int = 0\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass PermissionRequestRecord:\n    request_id: str\n    stage_id: str\n    action: str\n    context: Optional[str]\n    risk_level: RiskLevel\n    decision: Optional[str]\n    voters: list[dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=list)\n    decided_at: Optional[str] = None\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass QuotaEventRecord:\n    event_id: str\n    provider: str\n    account_email: Optional[str]\n    event_type: str\n    details: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\n    created_at: str = \"\"\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass IntakeResult:\n    title: str\n    description: str\n    complexity: str\n    stages: list[PlannedStage]\n    goal: Optional[str] = None\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None\n    questions: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass ClarificationQuestion:\n    key: str\n    prompt: str\n    default: Optional[str] = None\n    required: bool = False\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass ModelChoice:\n    model: str\n    provider: str\n    account_email: Optional[str] = None\n    reason: str = \"\"\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass PermissionDecision:\n    risk_level: RiskLevel\n    decision: str\n    reason: str\n    requires_voting: bool = False\n    requires_user: bool = False\n    votes: list[\"ModelVote\"] = field(default_factory=list)\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass StageExecutionResult:\n    stage_id: str\n    status: StageStatus\n    raw_output: str = \"\"\n    summary: str = \"\"\n    files_changed: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n    error: Optional[str] = None\n    duration_sec: float = 0.0\n    token_used: int = 0\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass StageCheckpoint:\n    stage_id: str\n    task_id: str\n    model_used: str\n    handoff_doc_path: str\n    files_modified: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)\n    retry_count: int = 0\n    paused_reason: str = \"quota_exhausted\"\n    paused_at: str = \"\"\n    partial_output: str = \"\"\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass ModelVote:\n    model: str\n    vote: str\n    reason: str\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass VoteResult:\n    decision: Optional[str]\n    votes: list[ModelVote] = field(default_factory=list)\n    unanimous: bool = False\n    needs_escalation: bool = False\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_7","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/task_queue.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"SQLite-backed task and stage queue.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom typing import Any, Iterable, Optional\n\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\nfrom harness.models import (\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\n    PlannedStage,\n    QuotaEventRecord,\n    RiskLevel,\n    StageRecord,\n    StageStatus,\n    TaskRecord,\n    TaskStatus,\n)\n\n\ndef utcnow_iso() -> str:\n    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\n\n\nclass TaskQueue:\n    \"\"\"CRUD layer for tasks, stages, and audit tables.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, db: HarnessDB) -> None:\n        self.db = db\n\n    def create_task(\n        self,\n        title: str,\n        description: str,\n        *,\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\n        complexity: str = \"medium\",\n        priority: int = 50,\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING,\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\n        task_id: Optional[str] = None,\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\n        now = utcnow_iso()\n        record = TaskRecord(\n            task_id=task_id or uuid.uuid4().hex,\n            title=title,\n            description=description,\n            goal=goal,\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\n            complexity=complexity,\n            priority=priority,\n            status=status,\n            working_dir=working_dir,\n            created_at=now,\n            updated_at=now,\n        )\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO tasks (\n                    task_id, title, description, goal, verify_cmd, complexity,\n                    priority, status, working_dir, created_at, updated_at\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    record.task_id,\n                    record.title,\n                    record.description,\n                    record.goal,\n                    record.verify_cmd,\n                    record.complexity,\n                    record.priority,\n                    record.status.value,\n                    record.working_dir,\n                    record.created_at,\n                    record.updated_at,\n                ),\n            )\n        return record\n\n    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\n\n    def list_tasks(self, status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None) -> list[TaskRecord]:\n        query = \"SELECT * FROM tasks\"\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\n        if status is not None:\n            query += \" WHERE status = ?\"\n            params = (status.value,)\n        query += \" ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC\"\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\n        return [self._row_to_task(row) for row in rows]\n\n    def pick_next_runnable_task(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM tasks\n                WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)\n                ORDER BY\n                    CASE status\n                        WHEN ? THEN 0\n                        WHEN ? THEN 1\n                        ELSE 2\n                    END,\n                    priority DESC,\n                    created_at ASC\n                LIMIT 1\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.PLANNING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\n                ),\n            ).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\n\n    def update_task_status(self, task_id: str, status: TaskStatus) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"UPDATE tasks SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\",\n                (status.value, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\n            )\n\n    def update_task_working_dir(self, task_id: str, working_dir: str) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"UPDATE tasks SET working_dir = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\",\n                (working_dir, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\n            )\n\n    def save_stages(self, task_id: str, stages: Iterable[PlannedStage]) -> list[StageRecord]:\n        now = utcnow_iso()\n        records: list[StageRecord] = []\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            for planned in stages:\n                record = StageRecord(\n                    stage_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n                    task_id=task_id,\n                    stage_type=planned.stage_type,\n                    stage_order=planned.stage_order,\n                    model_role=planned.model_role,\n                    assigned_model=None,\n                    assigned_provider=None,\n                    status=StageStatus.PENDING,\n                    handoff_doc_path=None,\n                    result_summary=None,\n                    token_used=0,\n                    duration_sec=0.0,\n                    started_at=None,\n                    finished_at=None,\n                    retry_count=0,\n                    verify_cmd=planned.verify_cmd,\n                    metadata=dict(planned.metadata),\n                )\n                conn.execute(\n                    \"\"\"\n                    INSERT INTO stages (\n                        stage_id, task_id, stage_type, stage_order, model_role,\n                        assigned_model, assigned_provider, status, handoff_doc_path,\n                        result_summary, token_used, duration_sec, started_at,\n                        finished_at, retry_count, verify_cmd, metadata\n                    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n                    \"\"\",\n                    (\n                        record.stage_id,\n                        record.task_id,\n                        record.stage_type,\n                        record.stage_order,\n                        record.model_role,\n                        record.assigned_model,\n                        record.assigned_provider,\n                        record.status.value,\n                        record.handoff_doc_path,\n                        record.result_summary,\n                        record.token_used,\n                        record.duration_sec,\n                        record.started_at,\n                        record.finished_at,\n                        record.retry_count,\n                        record.verify_cmd,\n                        json.dumps(record.metadata),\n                    ),\n                )\n                records.append(record)\n            conn.execute(\n                \"UPDATE tasks SET updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\",\n                (now, task_id),\n            )\n        return records\n\n    def count_stages(self, task_id: str) -> int:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM stages WHERE task_id = ?\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\n        return int(row[\"count\"])\n\n    def get_stage(self, stage_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE stage_id = ?\", (stage_id,)).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\n\n    def list_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(\n                \"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE task_id = ? ORDER BY stage_order ASC\",\n                (task_id,),\n            ).fetchall()\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\n\n    def list_completed_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM stages\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status IN (?, ?)\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\n                \"\"\",\n                (task_id, StageStatus.DONE.value, StageStatus.SKIPPED.value),\n            ).fetchall()\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\n\n    def next_pending_stage(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM stages\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status = ?\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\n                LIMIT 1\n                \"\"\",\n                (task_id, StageStatus.PENDING.value),\n            ).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\n\n    def assign_stage_model(\n        self,\n        stage_id: str,\n        model: str,\n        provider: str,\n        *,\n        account_email: Optional[str] = None,\n        reason: Optional[str] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        metadata = self._load_stage_metadata(stage_id)\n        metadata[\"selected_account_email\"] = account_email\n        if reason:\n            metadata[\"selection_reason\"] = reason\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET assigned_model = ?, assigned_provider = ?, metadata = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_8","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/main.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"Harness entry point and scheduler loop.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport argparse\nimport asyncio\nimport json\nimport logging\nimport signal\nimport sys\nimport uuid\nfrom collections import Counter\nfrom dataclasses import asdict\nfrom dataclasses import replace\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom config import settings\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\nfrom harness.checkpoint import CheckpointStore\nfrom harness.codex_runtime import CodexAccountRuntime\nfrom harness.daemon import DaemonManager\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\nfrom harness.handoff import HandoffProtocol\nfrom harness.intake import IntakeAgent\nfrom harness.logging_utils import configure_logging\nfrom harness.model_registry import ModelRegistry\nfrom harness.models import (\n    IntakeResult,\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\n    QuotaEventRecord,\n    StageCheckpoint,\n    StageRecord,\n    StageStatus,\n    TaskRecord,\n    TaskStatus,\n)\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\nfrom harness.quota_router import AllQuotaExhaustedError, QuotaRouter\nfrom harness.stage_executor import PermissionBlockedError, QuotaExhaustedError, StageExecutionError, StageExecutor\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue, utcnow_iso\nfrom harness.telemetry import HarnessTelemetry\n\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n\n\nclass Harness:\n    \"\"\"Main scheduler that turns queued tasks into stage executions.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        db_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_DB_PATH,\n        artifact_root: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ARTIFACT_DIR,\n        intake_agent: Optional[IntakeAgent] = None,\n        quota_router: Optional[QuotaRouter] = None,\n        stage_executor: Optional[StageExecutor] = None,\n        telemetry: Optional[HarnessTelemetry] = None,\n        codex_runtime: Optional[CodexAccountRuntime] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        self.db = HarnessDB(db_path)\n        self.task_queue = TaskQueue(self.db)\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\n        self.executor = stage_executor or StageExecutor()\n        self.telemetry = telemetry or HarnessTelemetry()\n        self.codex_runtime = codex_runtime or CodexAccountRuntime()\n\n    def submit_task(\n        self,\n        description: str,\n        *,\n        title: Optional[str] = None,\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\n        priority: int = 50,\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\n        if title:\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\n\n    def submit_intake(\n        self,\n        intake: IntakeResult,\n        *,\n        priority: int = 50,\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\n            title=intake.title,\n            description=intake.description,\n            goal=intake.goal,\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\n            priority=priority,\n            status=status,\n            working_dir=working_dir,\n        )\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\n        return task\n\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\n        if task is None:\n            return None\n\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\n\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\n        if stage is None:\n            await self._finish_task(task)\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\n\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\n\n    async def run_forever(\n        self,\n        poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC,\n        *,\n        stop_event: Optional[asyncio.Event] = None,\n    ) -> None:\n        while stop_event is None or not stop_event.is_set():\n            task = await self.run_once()\n            if task is None:\n                if stop_event is None:\n                    await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\n                else:\n                    try:\n                        await asyncio.wait_for(stop_event.wait(), timeout=poll_interval_sec)\n                    except asyncio.TimeoutError:\n                        pass\n\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\n        report: list[dict[str, object]] = []\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks():\n            report.append(\n                {\n                    \"task_id\": task.task_id,\n                    \"title\": task.title,\n                    \"status\": task.status.value,\n                    \"priority\": task.priority,\n                    \"complexity\": task.complexity,\n                    \"working_dir\": task.working_dir,\n                    \"stages\": [\n                        {\n                            \"stage_type\": stage.stage_type,\n                            \"status\": stage.status.value,\n                            \"assigned_model\": stage.assigned_model,\n                            \"retry_count\": stage.retry_count,\n                        }\n                        for stage in self.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\n                    ],\n                }\n            )\n        return report\n\n    def inspect_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\n        if task is None:\n            raise KeyError(f\"Task not found: {task_id}\")\n\n        stages = self.task_queue.list_stages(task_id)\n        return {\n            \"task\": {\n                \"task_id\": task.task_id,\n                \"title\": task.title,\n                \"description\": task.description,\n                \"goal\": task.goal,\n                \"verify_cmd\": task.verify_cmd,\n                \"status\": task.status.value,\n                \"priority\": task.priority,\n                \"complexity\": task.complexity,\n                \"working_dir\": task.working_dir,\n                \"created_at\": task.created_at,\n                \"updated_at\": task.updated_at,\n            },\n            \"stages\": [\n                {\n                    \"stage_id\": stage.stage_id,\n                    \"stage_type\": stage.stage_type,\n                    \"model_role\": stage.model_role,\n                    \"status\": stage.status.value,\n                    \"assigned_model\": stage.assigned_model,\n                    \"assigned_provider\": stage.assigned_provider,\n                    \"handoff_doc_path\": stage.handoff_doc_path,\n                    \"result_summary\": stage.result_summary,\n                    \"retry_count\": stage.retry_count,\n                    \"verify_cmd\": stage.verify_cmd,\n                    \"metadata\": stage.metadata,\n                }\n                for stage in stages\n            ],\n            \"permission_requests\": [\n                {\n                    \"request_id\": item.request_id,\n                    \"stage_id\": item.stage_id,\n                    \"action\": item.action,\n                    \"risk_level\": item.risk_level.value,\n                    \"decision\": item.decision,\n                    \"voters\": item.voters,\n                    \"decided_at\": item.decided_at,\n                }\n                for stage in stages\n                for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\n            ],\n            \"checkpoints\": [\n                asdict(checkpoint) for checkpoint in self.checkpoints.list_for_task(task_id)\n            ],\n        }\n\n    def pause_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\n\n    def resume_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\n        if task is None:\n            raise KeyError(f\"Task not found: {task_id}\")\n        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DONE, TaskStatus.FAILED}:\n            raise ValueError(f\"Cannot resume task in terminal status {task.status.value}\")\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n\n    def quota_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\n        snapshots = self.router.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\n        return [\n            {\n                \"provider\": snapshot.provider.value,\n                \"email\": snapshot.email,\n                \"remaining_percent\": snapshot.remaining_percent,\n                \"reset_at\": snapshot.reset_at_readable,\n                \"time_until_reset_hours\": round(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 1),\n            }\n            for snapshot in snapshots\n        ]\n\n    def dashboard_report(\n        self,\n        *,\n        daemon_status: Optional[dict[str, object]] = None,\n        recent_events: int = settings.HARNESS_DASHBOARD_RECENT_EVENTS,\n    ) -> dict[str, object]:\n        tasks = self.task_queue.list_tasks()\n        stages = [stage for task in tasks for stage in self.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)]\n        permission_requests = [\n            item\n            for stage in stages\n            for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\n        ]\n        quota_events = self.task_queue.list_quota_events()\n        telemetry = self.telemetry.summarize(recent_limit=recent_events)\n\n        task_statuses = Counter(task.status.value for task in tasks)\n        stage_statuses = Counter(stage.status.value for stage in stages)\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_9","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,240p' harness/model_registry.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_9","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,240p' harness/model_registry.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"Unified model name resolution.\n\nEvery model has one canonical name (the key in role_models.yaml).\nEach model may declare aliases — alternative names used by chat2api,\nCLI tools, or shorthand references.\n\nModelRegistry enforces a strict invariant: **no alias may point to\nmore than one canonical name**.  This is validated at load time so\nthat name collisions are caught early rather than at runtime.\n\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Any\n\nimport yaml\n\nfrom config import settings\n\n\nclass AliasCollisionError(ValueError):\n    \"\"\"Raised when an alias resolves to more than one canonical model.\"\"\"\n\n\nclass ModelRegistry:\n    \"\"\"Single source of truth for model name resolution.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH) -> None:\n        self._catalog = self._load(catalog_path)\n        self._models: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = self._catalog.get(\"models\", {})\n        # canonical name → set of aliases (including the canonical name itself)\n        self._alias_to_canonical: dict[str, str] = {}\n        self._build_index()\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Public API\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    def resolve(self, name: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Resolve any name (canonical or alias) to its canonical name.\n\n        Returns the input unchanged if it is not recognised — this keeps\n        the system open to ad-hoc model names that haven't been catalogued.\n        \"\"\"\n        return self._alias_to_canonical.get(name, name)\n\n    def chat2api_id(self, name: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the chat2api model ID for *name* (canonical or alias).\"\"\"\n        canonical = self.resolve(name)\n        info = self._models.get(canonical, {})\n        return info.get(\"chat2api_id\", canonical)\n\n    def cli_model_id(self, name: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the CLI model ID for *name* (canonical or alias).\n\n        Falls back to the canonical name if no cli_model_id is configured.\n        \"\"\"\n        canonical = self.resolve(name)\n        info = self._models.get(canonical, {})\n        return info.get(\"cli_model_id\", canonical)\n\n    def provider(self, name: str) -> str:\n        \"\"\"Return the provider string for *name*.\"\"\"\n        canonical = self.resolve(name)\n        return self._models.get(canonical, {}).get(\"provider\", \"\")\n\n    def get_info(self, name: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Return the full catalog entry for *name*.\"\"\"\n        canonical = self.resolve(name)\n        return dict(self._models.get(canonical, {}))\n\n    def canonical_names(self) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return all canonical model names.\"\"\"\n        return list(self._models.keys())\n\n    def available_canonical_names(self, live_ids: set[str]) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return canonical names whose chat2api_id appears in *live_ids*.\"\"\"\n        return [\n            name for name in self._models\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\n        ]\n\n    def roles(self) -> dict[str, list[str]]:\n        \"\"\"Return role → [canonical model names] mapping.\"\"\"\n        return dict(self._catalog.get(\"roles\", {}))\n\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\n        \"\"\"Return ordered candidate list for *role*.\"\"\"\n        roles = self._catalog.get(\"roles\", {})\n        configured = roles.get(role)\n        if configured:\n            return list(configured)\n        return self.canonical_names()\n\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n    # Internals\n    # ------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def _load(path: str | Path) -> dict[str, Any]:\n        with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as fh:\n            return yaml.safe_load(fh) or {}\n\n    def _build_index(self) -> None:\n        \"\"\"Build alias → canonical mapping with collision detection.\n\n        Only the canonical name and explicit aliases are registered.\n        chat2api_id and cli_model_id are *not* registered as aliases\n        because multiple models may share a gateway ID (e.g. sonnet\n        and haiku both use ``copilot-claude``).  Outbound resolution\n        uses the dedicated ``chat2api_id()`` / ``cli_model_id()``\n        methods which look up the value directly.\n        \"\"\"\n        for canonical, info in self._models.items():\n            self._register(canonical, canonical)\n            for alias in info.get(\"aliases\", []):\n                if alias and alias != canonical:\n                    self._register(alias, canonical)\n\n    def _register(self, alias: str, canonical: str) -> None:\n        existing = self._alias_to_canonical.get(alias)\n        if existing is not None and existing != canonical:\n            raise AliasCollisionError(\n                f\"Alias {alias!r} maps to both {existing!r} and {canonical!r}. \"\n                f\"Each alias must resolve to exactly one canonical model.\"\n            )\n        self._alias_to_canonical[alias] = canonical\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_10","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '260,620p' harness/main.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_10","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '260,620p' harness/main.py\"","aggregated_output":"        stage_statuses = Counter(stage.status.value for stage in stages)\n        running_stages = [\n            {\n                \"task_id\": stage.task_id,\n                \"stage_id\": stage.stage_id,\n                \"stage_type\": stage.stage_type,\n                \"assigned_model\": stage.assigned_model,\n                \"assigned_provider\": stage.assigned_provider,\n                \"account_email\": stage.metadata.get(\"selected_account_email\"),\n            }\n            for stage in stages\n            if stage.status == StageStatus.RUNNING\n        ]\n\n        return {\n            \"generated_at\": utcnow_iso(),\n            \"daemon\": daemon_status or {},\n            \"tasks\": {\n                \"total\": len(tasks),\n                \"by_status\": dict(sorted(task_statuses.items())),\n            },\n            \"stages\": {\n                \"total\": len(stages),\n                \"by_status\": dict(sorted(stage_statuses.items())),\n                \"running\": running_stages,\n                \"metrics\": telemetry[\"overall\"],\n                \"by_stage_type\": telemetry[\"by_stage_type\"],\n            },\n            \"quota\": {\n                \"event_count\": len(quota_events),\n                \"recent\": [\n                    {\n                        \"provider\": item.provider,\n                        \"account_email\": item.account_email,\n                        \"event_type\": item.event_type,\n                        \"created_at\": item.created_at,\n                        \"details\": item.details,\n                    }\n                    for item in quota_events[-5:]\n                ],\n            },\n            \"permissions\": {\n                \"request_count\": len(permission_requests),\n                \"recent\": [\n                    {\n                        \"stage_id\": item.stage_id,\n                        \"action\": item.action,\n                        \"decision\": item.decision,\n                        \"risk_level\": item.risk_level.value,\n                        \"decided_at\": item.decided_at,\n                    }\n                    for item in permission_requests[-5:]\n                ],\n            },\n            \"recent_events\": telemetry[\"recent_events\"],\n        }\n\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PLANNING)\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(task.description, goal=task.goal, verify_cmd=task.verify_cmd)\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n\n    async def _recover_paused_quota_tasks(self) -> None:\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks(TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA):\n            stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\n            if stage is None:\n                continue\n            if self.router.can_run_stage(task, stage):\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n                self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\n                    QuotaEventRecord(\n                        event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n                        provider=stage.assigned_provider or \"unknown\",\n                        account_email=None,\n                        event_type=\"recovered\",\n                        details={\"task_id\": task.task_id, \"stage_id\": stage.stage_id},\n                        created_at=utcnow_iso(),\n                    )\n                )\n                self.telemetry.emit(\n                    \"task_resumed_quota\",\n                    task_id=task.task_id,\n                    stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n                    stage_type=stage.stage_type,\n                    provider=stage.assigned_provider,\n                )\n\n    async def _run_stage(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\n        try:\n            if not stage.assigned_model or not stage.assigned_provider:\n                choice = self.router.select_model(task, stage)\n                self.task_queue.assign_stage_model(\n                    stage.stage_id,\n                    choice.model,\n                    choice.provider,\n                    account_email=choice.account_email,\n                    reason=choice.reason,\n                )\n                stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\n\n            self._ensure_stage_runtime(stage)\n            previous = self.task_queue.list_completed_stages(task.task_id)\n            handoff_path = self.handoff.write_handoff(task, stage, previous)\n            self.task_queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, str(handoff_path))\n            stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\n            self._emit_stage_event(\"stage_started\", task, stage)\n\n            result = await self.executor.execute(stage, str(handoff_path), task.working_dir)\n            if stage.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\n                verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(stage.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\n                if verification.returncode != 0:\n                    raise StageExecutionError(verification.stderr.strip() or verification.stdout.strip() or stage.verify_cmd)\n\n            self.handoff.save_stage_output(task, stage, result)\n            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\n                stage.stage_id,\n                result_summary=result.summary,\n                token_used=result.token_used,\n                duration_sec=result.duration_sec,\n            )\n            self.checkpoints.delete(task.task_id, stage.stage_id)\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n            self._emit_stage_event(\n                \"stage_succeeded\",\n                task,\n                stage,\n                duration_sec=result.duration_sec,\n                token_used=result.token_used,\n                summary=result.summary,\n                files_changed=result.files_changed,\n            )\n\n            if self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id) is None:\n                await self._finish_task(task)\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError as exc:\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA)\n            self._emit_stage_event(\"stage_paused_quota\", task, stage, error=str(exc))\n        except QuotaExhaustedError as exc:\n            retry_count = stage.retry_count + 1\n            account_email = self._stage_account_email(stage)\n            within_same_model_budget = retry_count <= settings.QUOTA_SAME_MODEL_RETRIES\n\n            if within_same_model_budget:\n                # Keep assigned_model — retry the same model after a brief pause\n                self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(\n                    stage.stage_id,\n                    retry_count=retry_count,\n                    clear_model=False,\n                )\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n                self._emit_stage_event(\n                    \"stage_quota_retry_same_model\",\n                    task,\n                    stage,\n                    error=str(exc),\n                    provider=exc.provider,\n                    retry_count=retry_count,\n                    max_same_model=settings.QUOTA_SAME_MODEL_RETRIES,\n                )\n            else:\n                # Exhausted same-model retries — clear model and pause for fallback\n                self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=retry_count)\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA)\n                checkpoint = StageCheckpoint(\n                    stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n                    task_id=task.task_id,\n                    model_used=stage.assigned_model or \"\",\n                    handoff_doc_path=stage.handoff_doc_path or str(self.handoff.handoff_path(task, stage)),\n                    files_modified=[],\n                    retry_count=retry_count,\n                    paused_reason=\"quota_exhausted\",\n                    paused_at=utcnow_iso(),\n                    partial_output=exc.partial_output,\n                )\n                self.checkpoints.save(checkpoint)\n                self._emit_stage_event(\n                    \"stage_paused_quota\",\n                    task,\n                    stage,\n                    error=str(exc),\n                    provider=exc.provider,\n                )\n\n            self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\n                QuotaEventRecord(\n                    event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n                    provider=exc.provider,\n                    account_email=account_email,\n                    event_type=\"quota_retry\" if within_same_model_budget else \"exhausted\",\n                    details={\"stage_id\": stage.stage_id, \"task_id\": task.task_id, \"retry_count\": retry_count},\n                    created_at=utcnow_iso(),\n                )\n            )\n        except PermissionBlockedError as exc:\n            self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=stage.retry_count)\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\n            self.task_queue.log_permission_request(\n                PermissionRequestRecord(\n                    request_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n                    stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n                    action=exc.command,\n                    context=f\"task={task.task_id} stage={stage.stage_type}\",\n                    risk_level=exc.decision.risk_level,\n                    decision=exc.decision.decision,\n                    voters=[\n                        {\"model\": vote.model, \"vote\": vote.vote, \"reason\": vote.reason}\n                        for vote in exc.decision.votes\n                    ],\n                    decided_at=utcnow_iso(),\n                )\n            )\n            self._emit_stage_event(\n                \"stage_paused_permission\",\n                task,\n                stage,\n                error=str(exc),\n                command=exc.command,\n                decision=exc.decision.decision,\n            )\n        except StageExecutionError as exc:\n            retry_count = stage.retry_count + 1\n            if retry_count > settings.MAX_RETRIES:\n                self.task_queue.fail_stage(stage.stage_id, result_summary=str(exc), retry_count=retry_count)\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\n                self._emit_stage_event(\"stage_failed\", task, stage, error=str(exc), retry_count=retry_count)\n                self.telemetry.emit(\"task_finished\", task_id=task.task_id, status=TaskStatus.FAILED.value)\n            else:\n                self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=retry_count)\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n                self._emit_stage_event(\"stage_retry\", task, stage, error=str(exc), retry_count=retry_count)\n\n    async def _finish_task(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\n        if task.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\n            verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(task.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\n            if verification.returncode != 0:\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\n                self.telemetry.emit(\"task_finished\", task_id=task.task_id, status=TaskStatus.FAILED.value)\n                return\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.DONE)\n        self.telemetry.emit(\"task_finished\", task_id=task.task_id, status=TaskStatus.DONE.value)\n\n    def _ensure_stage_runtime(self, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\n        if stage.assigned_provider != \"codex\":\n            return\n        self.codex_runtime.ensure_active(self._stage_account_email(stage))\n\n    def _stage_account_email(self, stage: StageRecord) -> str | None:\n        account_email = stage.metadata.get(\"selected_account_email\")\n        return account_email if isinstance(account_email, str) and account_email else None\n\n    def _emit_stage_event(\n        self,\n        event_type: str,\n        task: TaskRecord,\n        stage: StageRecord,\n        **payload: object,\n    ) -> None:\n        event_payload = {\n            \"task_id\": task.task_id,\n            \"task_status\": task.status.value,\n            \"stage_id\": stage.stage_id,\n            \"stage_type\": stage.stage_type,\n            \"model_role\": stage.model_role,\n            \"assigned_model\": stage.assigned_model,\n            \"assigned_provider\": stage.assigned_provider,\n            \"account_email\": self._stage_account_email(stage),\n            \"retry_count\": stage.retry_count,\n        }\n        event_payload.update(payload)\n        self.telemetry.emit(event_type, **event_payload)\n\n\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\"Autonomous multi-LLM harness\")\n    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\"command\", required=True)\n\n    submit = subparsers.add_parser(\"submit\", help=\"Submit a task into the harness queue\")\n    submit.add_argument(\"description\", help=\"Task description\")\n    submit.add_argument(\"--title\", help=\"Override generated title\")\n    submit.add_argument(\"--goal\", help=\"Acceptance goal\")\n    submit.add_argument(\"--verify-cmd\", help=\"Verification command\")\n    submit.add_argument(\"--priority\", type=int, default=50)\n    submit.add_argument(\"--working-dir\", help=\"Task working directory\")\n\n    chat = subparsers.add_parser(\"chat\", help=\"Interactive requirement clarification\")\n    chat.add_argument(\"description\", nargs=\"?\", help=\"Initial task description\")\n    chat.add_argument(\"--priority\", type=int, default=50)\n    chat.add_argument(\"--working-dir\", help=\"Task working directory\")\n\n    inspect = subparsers.add_parser(\"inspect\", help=\"Show a task in detail\")\n    inspect.add_argument(\"task_id\")\n\n    pause = subparsers.add_parser(\"pause\", help=\"Pause a task\")\n    pause.add_argument(\"task_id\")\n\n    resume = subparsers.add_parser(\"resume\", help=\"Resume a task\")\n    resume.add_argument(\"task_id\")\n\n    subparsers.add_parser(\"quota\", help=\"Show quota snapshot\")\n    subparsers.add_parser(\"run-once\", help=\"Run one scheduling iteration\")\n    subparsers.add_parser(\"status\", help=\"Show queued tasks\")\n    dashboard = subparsers.add_parser(\"dashboard\", help=\"Show current harness overview\")\n    dashboard.add_argument(\"--recent-events\", type=int, default=settings.HARNESS_DASHBOARD_RECENT_EVENTS)\n\n    daemon = subparsers.add_parser(\"daemon\", help=\"Manage the background harness worker\")\n    daemon_subparsers = daemon.add_subparsers(dest=\"daemon_command\", required=True)\n    daemon_start = daemon_subparsers.add_parser(\"start\", help=\"Start the background worker\")\n    daemon_start.add_argument(\"--poll-interval\", type=int, default=settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC)\n    daemon_stop = daemon_subparsers.add_parser(\"stop\", help=\"Stop the background worker\")\n    daemon_stop.add_argument(\"--timeout\", type=float, default=settings.HARNESS_DAEMON_STOP_TIMEOUT_SEC)\n    daemon_subparsers.add_parser(\"status\", help=\"Show background worker status\")\n\n    worker = subparsers.add_parser(\"_worker\", help=argparse.SUPPRESS)\n    worker.add_argument(\"--poll-interval\", type=int, default=settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC)\n    return parser\n\n\nasync def _prompt_user_approval(command: str, context: str) -> bool | None:\n    if not sys.stdin.isatty():\n        return None\n    print(f\"Permission request for command: {command}\")\n    if context:\n        print(f\"Context: {context}\")\n    answer = await asyncio.to_thread(input, \"Allow? [y/N]: \")\n    lowered = answer.strip().lower()\n    if lowered in {\"y\", \"yes\"}:\n        return True\n    if lowered in {\"n\", \"no\", \"\"}:\n        return False\n    return None\n\n\ndef build_cli_harness() -> Harness:\n    registry = ModelRegistry()\n    chat_client = Chat2APIClient()\n    permission_gate = PermissionGate(user_approver=_prompt_user_approval)\n    stage_executor = StageExecutor(chat_client=chat_client, registry=registry, permission_gate=permission_gate)\n    quota_router = QuotaRouter(registry=registry, chat_client=chat_client)\n    return Harness(quota_router=quota_router, stage_executor=stage_executor)\n\n\ndef build_daemon_manager() -> DaemonManager:\n    return DaemonManager(cwd=Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent)\n\n\ndef _read_multiline_description() -> str:\n    print(\"Describe the task. Press Enter twice to finish:\")\n    lines: list[str] = []\n    while True:\n        line = input()\n        if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\n            break\n        lines.append(line)\n    return \"\\n\".join(lines).strip()\n\n\ndef _run_chat_submission(harness: Harness, description: str | None, priority: int, working_dir: str | None) -> TaskRecord:\n    initial_description = description or _read_multiline_description()\n    if not initial_description:\n        raise ValueError(\"Task description cannot be empty.\")\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_11","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '620,920p' harness/main.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_11","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '620,920p' harness/main.py\"","aggregated_output":"        raise ValueError(\"Task description cannot be empty.\")\n\n    base = harness.intake.plan_task(initial_description)\n    questions = harness.intake.generate_questions(initial_description, base.complexity)\n    answers: dict[str, str] = {}\n    for question in questions:\n        suffix = f\" [{question.default}]\" if question.default else \"\"\n        response = input(f\"{question.prompt}{suffix}: \").strip()\n        answers[question.key] = response or (question.default or \"\")\n\n    intake = harness.intake.apply_answers(initial_description, answers)\n    return harness.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\n\n\nasync def _main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\n    if args.command == \"submit\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        task = harness.submit_task(\n            args.description,\n            title=args.title,\n            goal=args.goal,\n            verify_cmd=args.verify_cmd,\n            priority=args.priority,\n            working_dir=args.working_dir,\n        )\n        print(task.task_id)\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"chat\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        task = _run_chat_submission(harness, args.description, args.priority, args.working_dir)\n        print(json.dumps({\"task_id\": task.task_id, \"title\": task.title}, ensure_ascii=False))\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"run-once\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        task = await harness.run_once()\n        print(task.task_id if task else \"idle\")\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"status\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        for item in harness.status_report():\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"inspect\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        print(json.dumps(harness.inspect_task(args.task_id), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"pause\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        harness.pause_task(args.task_id)\n        print(args.task_id)\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"resume\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        harness.resume_task(args.task_id)\n        print(args.task_id)\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"quota\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        for item in harness.quota_report():\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"dashboard\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        daemon_status = build_daemon_manager().status()\n        print(json.dumps(harness.dashboard_report(daemon_status=daemon_status, recent_events=args.recent_events), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n        return 0\n    if args.command == \"daemon\":\n        manager = build_daemon_manager()\n        if args.daemon_command == \"start\":\n            print(json.dumps(manager.start(poll_interval_sec=args.poll_interval), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n            return 0\n        if args.daemon_command == \"stop\":\n            print(json.dumps(manager.stop(timeout_sec=args.timeout), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n            return 0\n        if args.daemon_command == \"status\":\n            print(json.dumps(manager.status(), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\n            return 0\n    if args.command == \"_worker\":\n        harness = build_cli_harness()\n        stop_event = asyncio.Event()\n        _install_signal_handlers(stop_event)\n        await harness.run_forever(args.poll_interval, stop_event=stop_event)\n        return 0\n    return 1\n\n\ndef main() -> None:\n    configure_logging()\n    parser = build_parser()\n    args = parser.parse_args()\n    raise SystemExit(asyncio.run(_main_async(args)))\n\n\ndef _install_signal_handlers(stop_event: asyncio.Event) -> None:\n    def _request_stop() -> None:\n        logger.info(\"Received shutdown signal; stopping after current iteration.\")\n        stop_event.set()\n\n    loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()\n    for sig in (signal.SIGTERM, signal.SIGINT):\n        try:\n            loop.add_signal_handler(sig, _request_stop)\n        except NotImplementedError:\n            signal.signal(sig, lambda *_args: _request_stop())\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_12","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' tests/harness/test_intake.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_12","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' tests/harness/test_intake.py\"","aggregated_output":"from harness.intake import IntakeAgent\n\n\ndef test_intake_plans_simple_task() -> None:\n    agent = IntakeAgent()\n\n    result = agent.plan_task(\n        \"Add a blacklist setting to the scheduler, wire config loading, and cover it with tests.\"\n    )\n\n    assert result.title == \"Add a blacklist setting to the scheduler, wire config loading, and cover it\"\n    assert result.complexity == \"simple\"\n    assert [stage.stage_type for stage in result.stages] == [\"code\", \"review\", \"github_ops\"]\n    assert [stage.model_role for stage in result.stages] == [\"coder\", \"reviewer\", \"github_ops\"]\n\n\ndef test_intake_marks_complex_work() -> None:\n    agent = IntakeAgent()\n\n    result = agent.plan_task(\n        \"Build a quota-aware scheduler with checkpoint recovery, permission voting, \"\n        \"workflow persistence, and a resumable execution loop.\"\n    )\n\n    assert result.complexity == \"complex\"\n    assert [stage.stage_type for stage in result.stages] == [\n        \"plan\",\n        \"code\",\n        \"review\",\n        \"test\",\n        \"e2e_test\",\n        \"github_ops\",\n    ]\n\n\ndef test_intake_generates_questions_and_applies_answers() -> None:\n    agent = IntakeAgent()\n    description = \"Add a blacklist setting for subreddit filtering.\"\n\n    questions = agent.generate_questions(description, \"simple\")\n    result = agent.apply_answers(\n        description,\n        {\n            \"storage\": \"config/blacklist.yaml\",\n            \"verify_cmd\": \"pytest tests/test_blacklist.py\",\n            \"needs_cli\": \"y\",\n        },\n    )\n\n    assert [question.key for question in questions] == [\"storage\"]\n    assert \"Storage preference: config/blacklist.yaml.\" in result.description\n    assert \"User requested a CLI or management entrypoint.\" in result.description\n    assert result.verify_cmd == \"pytest tests/test_blacklist.py\"\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_13","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,240p' harness/db.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_13","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,240p' harness/db.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"SQLite schema and connection helpers for the harness.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport sqlite3\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\nfrom pathlib import Path\nfrom typing import Iterator\n\n\nSCHEMA = \"\"\"\nPRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;\n\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (\n    task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n    title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    description TEXT NOT NULL,\n    goal TEXT,\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\n    complexity TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',\n    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\n    working_dir TEXT,\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\n);\n\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stages (\n    stage_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n    task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(task_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    stage_type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    stage_order INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    model_role TEXT NOT NULL,\n    assigned_model TEXT,\n    assigned_provider TEXT,\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\n    handoff_doc_path TEXT,\n    result_summary TEXT,\n    token_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    duration_sec REAL DEFAULT 0,\n    started_at TEXT,\n    finished_at TEXT,\n    retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\n    metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}'\n);\n\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_requests (\n    request_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n    stage_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stages(stage_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n    action TEXT NOT NULL,\n    context TEXT,\n    risk_level TEXT NOT NULL,\n    decision TEXT,\n    voters TEXT DEFAULT '[]',\n    decided_at TEXT\n);\n\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quota_events (\n    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\n    provider TEXT NOT NULL,\n    account_email TEXT,\n    event_type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    details TEXT DEFAULT '{}',\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL\n);\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status_priority\n    ON tasks(status, priority DESC, created_at ASC);\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_order\n    ON stages(task_id, stage_order ASC);\n\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_status\n    ON stages(task_id, status, stage_order ASC);\n\"\"\"\n\n\nclass HarnessDB:\n    \"\"\"Small wrapper around a SQLite database file.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path) -> None:\n        self.db_path = Path(db_path)\n        self.db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\n        self.initialize()\n\n    def initialize(self) -> None:\n        with self.connect() as conn:\n            conn.executescript(SCHEMA)\n\n    @contextmanager\n    def connect(self) -> Iterator[sqlite3.Connection]:\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path)\n        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row\n        conn.execute(\"PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON\")\n        try:\n            yield conn\n            conn.commit()\n        except Exception:\n            conn.rollback()\n            raise\n        finally:\n            conn.close()\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_14","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,320p' tests/harness/test_main.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_14","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,320p' tests/harness/test_main.py\"","aggregated_output":"import asyncio\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom harness.main import Harness\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, PlannedStage, StageExecutionResult, StageStatus, TaskStatus\nfrom harness.stage_executor import CommandExecution, StageExecutionError\nfrom harness.telemetry import HarnessTelemetry\n\n\nclass DummyRouter:\n    def select_model(self, task, stage, **kwargs):\n        return ModelChoice(model=\"gpt-5.4-codex\", provider=\"codex\", reason=\"test\")\n\n    def can_run_stage(self, task, stage, **kwargs):\n        return True\n\n\nclass DummyExecutor:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self.executed = []\n\n    async def execute(self, stage, handoff_doc_path, working_dir):\n        self.executed.append((stage.stage_type, handoff_doc_path, working_dir))\n        return StageExecutionResult(\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\n            raw_output=\"implemented feature\",\n            summary=\"implemented feature\",\n            files_changed=[\"src/feature.py\"],\n        )\n\n    async def run_verify_cmd(self, verify_cmd, working_dir):\n        return CommandExecution(returncode=0, stdout=\"ok\", stderr=\"\")\n\n\nclass DummyCodexRuntime:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self.calls = []\n\n    def ensure_active(self, account_email):\n        self.calls.append(account_email)\n        return True\n\n\nclass AccountSelectingRouter(DummyRouter):\n    def select_model(self, task, stage, **kwargs):\n        return ModelChoice(\n            model=\"gpt-5.4-codex\",\n            provider=\"codex\",\n            account_email=\"codex-2@test\",\n            reason=\"test-account-rotation\",\n        )\n\n\nclass FlakyExecutor(DummyExecutor):\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        super().__init__()\n        self.calls = 0\n\n    async def execute(self, stage, handoff_doc_path, working_dir):\n        self.calls += 1\n        if self.calls == 1:\n            raise StageExecutionError(\"temporary failure\")\n        return StageExecutionResult(\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\n            raw_output=\"implemented feature\",\n            summary=\"implemented feature\",\n            files_changed=[\"src/feature.py\"],\n            duration_sec=4.5,\n            token_used=321,\n        )\n\n\ndef test_harness_run_once_executes_stage_and_finishes_task(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = DummyExecutor()\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=DummyRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n        telemetry=HarnessTelemetry(tmp_path / \"events.jsonl\"),\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\n        \"task\",\n        \"desc\",\n        status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\n        working_dir=str(tmp_path),\n    )\n    harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n\n    asyncio.run(harness.run_once())\n\n    updated_task = harness.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\n    [stage] = harness.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\n\n    assert updated_task is not None\n    assert updated_task.status == TaskStatus.DONE\n    assert stage.status == StageStatus.DONE\n    assert stage.handoff_doc_path is not None\n    assert Path(stage.handoff_doc_path).exists()\n    assert executor.executed == [(\"code\", stage.handoff_doc_path, str(tmp_path))]\n\n\ndef test_harness_recovers_paused_quota_tasks(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = DummyExecutor()\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=DummyRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n        telemetry=HarnessTelemetry(tmp_path / \"events.jsonl\"),\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\n        \"task\",\n        \"desc\",\n        status=TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA,\n        working_dir=str(tmp_path),\n    )\n    harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n\n    asyncio.run(harness.run_once())\n\n    updated_task = harness.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\n    assert updated_task is not None\n    assert updated_task.status == TaskStatus.DONE\n\n\ndef test_harness_inspect_includes_permission_requests(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = DummyExecutor()\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=DummyRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n        telemetry=HarnessTelemetry(tmp_path / \"events.jsonl\"),\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\"task\", \"desc\", status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING, working_dir=str(tmp_path))\n    [stage] = harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n    from harness.models import PermissionRequestRecord, RiskLevel\n\n    harness.task_queue.log_permission_request(\n        PermissionRequestRecord(\n            request_id=\"req-1\",\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n            action=\"git push origin main\",\n            context=\"task=demo\",\n            risk_level=RiskLevel.DANGEROUS,\n            decision=\"needs_user_approval\",\n            voters=[{\"model\": \"gpt-5.4-codex\", \"vote\": \"REJECT\", \"reason\": \"too risky\"}],\n            decided_at=\"2026-03-27T00:00:00+00:00\",\n        )\n    )\n\n    data = harness.inspect_task(task.task_id)\n\n    assert data[\"task\"][\"task_id\"] == task.task_id\n    assert data[\"permission_requests\"][0][\"action\"] == \"git push origin main\"\n\n\ndef test_harness_switches_codex_account_before_execution(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = DummyExecutor()\n    codex_runtime = DummyCodexRuntime()\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=AccountSelectingRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n        telemetry=HarnessTelemetry(tmp_path / \"events.jsonl\"),\n        codex_runtime=codex_runtime,\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\n        \"task\",\n        \"desc\",\n        status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\n        working_dir=str(tmp_path),\n    )\n    harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n\n    asyncio.run(harness.run_once())\n\n    [stage] = harness.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\n    assert codex_runtime.calls == [\"codex-2@test\"]\n    assert stage.metadata[\"selected_account_email\"] == \"codex-2@test\"\n\n\ndef test_harness_dashboard_summarizes_stage_metrics(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = FlakyExecutor()\n    telemetry = HarnessTelemetry(tmp_path / \"events.jsonl\")\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=DummyRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n        telemetry=telemetry,\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\n        \"task\",\n        \"desc\",\n        status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\n        working_dir=str(tmp_path),\n    )\n    harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n\n    asyncio.run(harness.run_once())\n    asyncio.run(harness.run_once())\n\n    report = harness.dashboard_report(daemon_status={\"running\": False}, recent_events=10)\n\n    assert report[\"daemon\"][\"running\"] is False\n    assert report[\"stages\"][\"metrics\"][\"attempts\"] == 2\n    assert report[\"stages\"][\"metrics\"][\"errors\"] == 1\n    assert report[\"stages\"][\"metrics\"][\"total_token_used\"] == 321\n    assert report[\"stages\"][\"by_stage_type\"][0][\"stage_type\"] == \"code\"\n    assert report[\"stages\"][\"by_stage_type\"][0][\"error_rate\"] == 0.5\n    assert [event[\"event\"] for event in report[\"recent_events\"]][-2:] == [\"stage_succeeded\", \"task_finished\"]\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_15","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' tests/harness/test_model_registry.py\"","aggregated_output":"import pytest\n\nfrom harness.model_registry import AliasCollisionError, ModelRegistry\n\n\n@pytest.fixture()\ndef registry(tmp_path):\n    catalog = tmp_path / \"models.yaml\"\n    catalog.write_text(\n        \"\"\"\\\nmodels:\n  claude-opus-4-6:\n    provider: claude\n    chat2api_id: copilot-claude-opus\n    cli_model_id: opus\n    aliases: [opus, claude-opus]\n  gpt-5.4-codex:\n    provider: codex\n    chat2api_id: codex\n    aliases: [codex, gpt-5.4]\n  gemini-3.1-pro:\n    provider: google\n    chat2api_id: gemini-pro\n    cli_model_id: gemini-3.1-pro-preview\n    aliases: [gemini-pro, gemini]\n  gpt-4o:\n    provider: github\n    chat2api_id: copilot-gpt4o\n    aliases: [gpt4o]\nroles:\n  coder:\n    - gpt-5.4-codex\n    - gemini-3.1-pro\n\"\"\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    return ModelRegistry(catalog)\n\n\ndef test_resolve_canonical_unchanged(registry):\n    assert registry.resolve(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"claude-opus-4-6\"\n\n\ndef test_resolve_alias(registry):\n    assert registry.resolve(\"opus\") == \"claude-opus-4-6\"\n    assert registry.resolve(\"codex\") == \"gpt-5.4-codex\"\n    assert registry.resolve(\"gemini\") == \"gemini-3.1-pro\"\n    assert registry.resolve(\"gpt4o\") == \"gpt-4o\"\n\n\ndef test_resolve_unknown_returns_input(registry):\n    assert registry.resolve(\"unknown-model\") == \"unknown-model\"\n\n\ndef test_chat2api_id(registry):\n    assert registry.chat2api_id(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"copilot-claude-opus\"\n    assert registry.chat2api_id(\"opus\") == \"copilot-claude-opus\"\n    assert registry.chat2api_id(\"gpt-5.4-codex\") == \"codex\"\n\n\ndef test_cli_model_id(registry):\n    assert registry.cli_model_id(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"opus\"\n    assert registry.cli_model_id(\"gemini-3.1-pro\") == \"gemini-3.1-pro-preview\"\n    # Falls back to canonical when cli_model_id not set\n    assert registry.cli_model_id(\"gpt-5.4-codex\") == \"gpt-5.4-codex\"\n\n\ndef test_provider(registry):\n    assert registry.provider(\"claude-opus-4-6\") == \"claude\"\n    assert registry.provider(\"codex\") == \"codex\"\n    assert registry.provider(\"gpt4o\") == \"github\"\n\n\ndef test_models_for_role(registry):\n    assert registry.models_for_role(\"coder\") == [\"gpt-5.4-codex\", \"gemini-3.1-pro\"]\n\n\ndef test_models_for_unknown_role_returns_all(registry):\n    result = registry.models_for_role(\"nonexistent\")\n    assert set(result) == {\"claude-opus-4-6\", \"gpt-5.4-codex\", \"gemini-3.1-pro\", \"gpt-4o\"}\n\n\ndef test_available_canonical_names(registry):\n    live = {\"codex\", \"gemini-pro\", \"copilot-gpt4o\"}\n    available = registry.available_canonical_names(live)\n    assert \"gpt-5.4-codex\" in available\n    assert \"gemini-3.1-pro\" in available\n    assert \"gpt-4o\" in available\n    assert \"claude-opus-4-6\" not in available\n\n\ndef test_alias_collision_raises(tmp_path):\n    catalog = tmp_path / \"bad.yaml\"\n    catalog.write_text(\n        \"\"\"\\\nmodels:\n  model-a:\n    provider: test\n    aliases: [shared-alias]\n  model-b:\n    provider: test\n    aliases: [shared-alias]\n\"\"\",\n        encoding=\"utf-8\",\n    )\n    with pytest.raises(AliasCollisionError, match=\"shared-alias\"):\n        ModelRegistry(catalog)\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
